skill.name: ai-image-generation
skill.description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: FLUX Dev LoRA, FLUX.2 Klein LoRA, Gemini 3 Pro Image, Grok Imagine, Seedream 4.5, Reve, ImagineArt. Capabilities: text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, LoRA, image editing, upscaling, text rendering. Use for: AI art, product mockups, concept art, social media graphics, marketing visuals, illustrations. Triggers: flux, image generation, ai image, text to image, stable diffusion, generate image, ai art, midjourney alternative, dall-e alternative, text2img, t2i, image generator, ai picture, create image with ai, generative ai, ai illustration, grok image, gemini image
skill.summary: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. Mode...
skill.author: inference-shell

security_audit.summary: Static scanner flagged 44 potential issues (external_commands, network URLs, weak crypto). Evaluation reveals all are false positives: backticks are documentation examples, URLs are legitimate service endpoints, and 'Seedream' triggered crypto detector. This is a pure documentation skill with no executable code.

content.user_title: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, and 50+ models
content.value_statement: Create stunning visuals without switching between AI tools. Access 50+ professional image models through a single CLI interface optimized for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code workflows.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text prompts using FLUX Dev, FLUX.2 Klein, Gemini 3 Pro, Grok Imagine, and Seedream models
Perform image-to-image transformations and editing with natural language instructions
Upscale images to 4K resolution using professional models like Topaz
Render accurate text within generated images using Reve and Seedream 3.0
Support multiple aspect ratios and output formats for different use cases
Access 50+ specialized image generation models through unified CLI
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI installation and authentication
Image generation depends on external service availability and rate limits
Cannot execute generations directly - provides documentation and command templates only
Some advanced models may require additional permissions or credits

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Visuals
use_cases.description: Create professional product mockups and marketing images for e-commerce listings, social media posts, and advertising campaigns using high-quality models.

use_cases.title: Concept Art and Prototyping
use_cases.description: Rapidly visualize design concepts, character designs, and scene mockups for games, films, and creative projects with text-to-image generation.

use_cases.title: Content Creation and Illustration
use_cases.description: Generate custom illustrations, blog headers, and social media graphics with specific styles and text rendering capabilities.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

prompt_templates.title: Basic Text-to-Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a professional product photo of a coffee mug on a wooden table with studio lighting, warm tones

prompt_templates.title: Styled Portrait Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a cinematic portrait of a woman at golden hour, dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens aesthetic
prompt_templates.scenario: Portrait photography style images with specific lighting

prompt_templates.title: Text Rendering Poster
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a poster that displays 'WELCOME' in bold modern typography, neon colors, cyberpunk background with city lights
prompt_templates.scenario: Images requiring accurate text rendering within the composition

prompt_templates.title: Advanced Scene Composition
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a photorealistic landscape with mountains reflecting in a calm lake at sunrise, misty atmosphere, wide angle perspective, National Geographic style
prompt_templates.scenario: Complex scenes with multiple elements and specific artistic direction

output_examples.input: A minimalist logo design for a tech startup, blue and white color scheme, clean geometric shapes
output_examples.output: Generated a 1024x1024 image featuring a modern geometric logo with interlocking blue shapes on white background, suitable for branding and marketing materials

output_examples.input: Fantasy castle on a cliff overlooking the ocean at sunset, dramatic clouds, epic scale
output_examples.output: Created a 1920x1080 landscape showing a medieval castle silhouette against orange and purple sunset sky, waves crashing below, cinematic composition with depth and atmosphere

output_examples.input: Product mockup of a smartphone displaying a fitness app interface on a marble surface
output_examples.output: Generated a professional product photo showing an iPhone on white marble with natural shadows, screen displaying a fitness dashboard with charts and metrics, studio quality lighting

best_practices: Use specific, descriptive prompts with clear subject, style, lighting, and composition details for better results
Start with faster models like FLUX.2 Klein for iterations, then use high-quality models like Seedream 4.5 for final outputs
Include aspect ratio parameters early in the prompt to avoid regenerating images with different dimensions
anti_patterns: Avoid vague prompts like 'make it pretty' - specify concrete visual elements and styles instead
Do not expect perfect text rendering on all models - use Reve or Seedream 3.0 when text accuracy is critical
Avoid sending sensitive or private information in prompts as images are processed by external AI services

faq.question: How do I install the inference.sh CLI required for this skill?
faq.answer: Run `npx skills add inference-sh/skills@agent-tools` to install the CLI. This provides authentication setup and the `infsh` command needed for image generation.

faq.question: Which model should I use for the highest quality images?
faq.answer: Seedream 4.5 and ImagineArt 1.5 Pro offer the highest quality with 4K resolution support. Use Seedream 3.0 when accurate text rendering is required.

faq.question: Can I edit existing images with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the Reve model for natural language image editing, or provide an image URL with modification instructions for image-to-image generation.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: Most models support common ratios like 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, and 9:16. Specify the aspect ratio in your prompt parameters for best results.

faq.question: Are there rate limits for image generation?
faq.answer: Rate limits depend on your inference.sh account tier. Free accounts have daily generation limits while paid plans offer higher quotas and priority processing.

faq.question: Can I use generated images for commercial purposes?
faq.answer: Commercial usage rights depend on the specific model and your inference.sh subscription. Check the model documentation and your account terms for licensing details.
